# export

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/export"
```

Package export formats transit events as CSV and JSON output.

EventsToCSV renders a slice of TransitEvent as a complete CSV document with headers. EventsToJSON produces the equivalent JSON array. EventToCSVRow and CSVRowToString handle individual row conversion.

<a name="EventsToCSV"></a>
## func [EventsToCSV](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/export/export.go#L188>)

```go
func EventsToCSV(events []models.TransitEvent, tz string, tzLabel string) string
```

EventsToCSV converts a list of transit events to CSV string. tz is the Go timezone location for date/time conversion. tzLabel is the display label \(e.g. "AWST"\); if empty, uses tz.

<a name="CSVRow"></a>
## type [CSVRow](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/export/export.go#L14-L32>)

CSVRow represents one row of transit CSV output

```go
type CSVRow struct {
    P1        string
    P1House   int
    Aspect    string
    P2        string
    P2House   int
    EventType string
    Type      string
    Date      string
    Time      string
    Timezone  string
    Age       float64
    Pos1Deg   float64
    Pos1Sign  string
    Pos1Dir   string
    Pos2Deg   float64
    Pos2Sign  string
    Pos2Dir   string
}
```


EventToCSVRow converts a TransitEvent to a CSVRow
